regex_any: (這週|这周|本週|本周|下週[一二三四五六日天]?|下周[一二三四五六日天]?|this\s+week|next\s+week|next\s+(mon|tues|wednes|thurs|fri|satur|sun)day)

auto_context.success_prompt:
Internal runtime note: the current local date/time was resolved by the default-execution skill `{skill_name}` before handling relative-date language.
Use this to interpret words like 今天, 明天, 後天, 下週, today, tomorrow, or next Monday.
Do not guess a calendar date when it can be derived from this context.
Do not mention this lookup unless it matters to the answer.
Time context JSON:
{result_json}
auto_context.error_prompt:
Internal runtime note: the default-execution skill `{skill_name}` failed while resolving local current time for relative-date language.
If the exact calendar date matters, ask a concise clarifying question instead of guessing.
